PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENIVRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement as to Manley Performance Products, Inc. and Samar Company, Inc. is granted. Plaintiff to submit a form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
